query_strategy: Multiple YouTube search.list requests, each targeting a specific media intent.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find context about a named historical event, scene shift, cultural moment, or local history.
query_candidates.q: Caribbean sound system culture Bronx hip hop origins 1967 1972 documentary

request_params.q: Caribbean sound system culture Bronx hip hop origins 1967 1972 documentary

query_candidates.reason: The event frames Caribbean sound-system practice as historical context for early Bronx hip-hop.
review_risks: Check that results discuss Caribbean sound-system culture and early hip-hop context, not generic reggae history.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find explanatory video, documentary context, archival footage, or scene history.
query_candidates.q: Jamaican sound system influence early hip hop Bronx documentary 1967 1972

request_params.q: Jamaican sound system influence early hip hop Bronx documentary 1967 1972

query_candidates.reason: A documentary query can surface explainers connecting migration, mobile sound systems, and Bronx DJ culture.
review_risks: Reject results that overstate direct causality or ignore the Bronx context.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find context about a relevant venue, club, block, park, neighborhood, or performance space.
query_candidates.q: South Bronx neighborhood parties sound system culture hip hop origins 1967 1972

request_params.q: South Bronx neighborhood parties sound system culture hip hop origins 1967 1972

query_candidates.reason: The event has a strong neighborhood and party-space component that may benefit from local context.
review_risks: Verify that South Bronx content is tied to music culture rather than unrelated urban history.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find a DJ set, break mix, party mix, turntablism demonstration, or historically framed mix.
query_candidates.q: Caribbean sound system roots early hip hop DJ mix 1967 1972

request_params.q: Caribbean sound system roots early hip hop DJ mix 1967 1972

query_candidates.reason: A mix can provide sound-world context, but it should not be treated as documentation of the exact event.
review_risks: Use only as listening context; reject modern mixes without historical framing.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find a YouTube playlist, mix, or curated song collection that matches the event context.
query_candidates.q: Caribbean sound system early hip hop Bronx roots playlist 1967 1972

request_params.q: Caribbean sound system early hip hop Bronx roots playlist 1967 1972

query_candidates.reason: A playlist may help represent source traditions and related sound-system culture.
review_risks: Check for generic reggae playlists with no early hip-hop or Bronx relevance.

omitted_intents.reason: The event does not name a specific recording.
The event describes a broad influence context rather than a named interview subject.

review_notes: Check whether results are historically relevant before adding links.
Reject YouTube Shorts, reaction shorts, teaser clips, and unrelated short-form uploads.
Keep all automatically found links as draft until editorial review.
Verify channel/source quality before promoting any media link to reviewed.
